title: cineraria maritima
intro: Cineraria maritima, also known as Veldt Grape or Sea Holly, is a flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. Cineraria maritima can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, which are used to make topical creams, ointments, and salves, as well as internal supplements.
